events.body:
> Add `## [Unreleased]` to `CHANGELOG.md`? (see #1268)

Ah, yeah. I'm fine with either. The github release links to Changelog on master, so not having it is a tiny bit nicer if you read it now. But then we need to include it with the next update to the Changelog.
